title: Hyperliquid Liquid Staking with @kinetiq_xyz
summary_title: Hyperliquid under fire: how validators, exchanges, and Kinetic reshape the ecosystem
summary_description: Inside yesterday's market attack, why centralized exchanges fear HyperLiquid, and how Kinetic's liquid staking reshapes DeFi primitives.

key_moments.label: Intro and hosts: Zerk, PBR, and Omnia from Kinetic kick off
Space topic: yesterday's HLP manipulation and coordinated exchange response
Omnia breaks down the attack: how Binance, OKEx, BitGet coordinated to trigger HLP bank run
Decentralization debate: HyperLiquid sits between Bitcoin and centralized exchanges on spectrum
Builder codes threat: how HyperLiquid's open exchange infrastructure threatens CEX cartels
Meme coin infrastructure: spot tokens, AMMs, and why HyperEVM changes the game
Kinetic liquid staking launch: why Omnia built it, validator selection, and StakeHub
PBR endorsement of Kinetic's ethos and validator fairness approach
Day-one KHype integrations: lending, CDPs, AMMs, bridges, and wrapped-by-design LST
Fee structure and incentives: Kinetic's approach to rewards and points
